testcase.name: test_uploaded_file_accessible

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfcc6021c89e0>('image/') + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfcc6021c89e0> = 'text/html; charset=utf-8'.startswith + where 'text/html; charset=utf-8' = get('content-type', '') + where get = {'Date': 'Mon, 16 Feb 2026 11:07:02 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'CF-Ray': '9cec943dc8e01144-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'Vary': 'Accept-Encoding', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'access-control-allow-headers': '*', 'access-control-allow-methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'x-powered-by': 'Express', 'Set-Cookie': '__cf_bm=.YycHP5KRYaFknPjx5R3XNNWdvUJnYvRe5bKDMQciR0-1771240022-1.0.1.1-nTk_Dum.Gy9fEYU6UPwu.rgNEJCzfF4lfoXjLY6iFyiHSYAGclA5VIHURDg25EhW31ZqgTyU4p7CGpDp5dnDBQayutKd47Fed.fr0AretF0; path=/; expires=Mon, 16-Feb-26 11:37:02 GMT; domain=.preview.emergentagent.com; HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=None', 'Server': 'cloudflare'}.get + where {'Date': 'Mon, 16 Feb 2026 11:07:02 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'CF-Ray': '9cec943dc8e01144-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'Vary': 'Accept-Encoding', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'access-control-allow-headers': '*', 'access-control-allow-methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'x-powered-by': 'Express', 'Set-Cookie': '__cf_bm=.YycHP5KRYaFknPjx5R3XNNWdvUJnYvRe5bKDMQciR0-1771240022-1.0.1.1-nTk_Dum.Gy9fEYU6UPwu.rgNEJCzfF4lfoXjLY6iFyiHSYAGclA5VIHURDg25EhW31ZqgTyU4p7CGpDp5dnDBQayutKd47Fed.fr0AretF0; path=/; expires=Mon, 16-Feb-26 11:37:02 GMT; domain=.preview.emergentagent.com; HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=None', 'Server': 'cloudflare'} = <Response [200]>.headers

testcase.failure: tests/test_upload_api.py:285: in test_uploaded_file_accessible assert static_response.headers.get("content-type", "").startswith("image/") E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfcc6021c89e0>('image/') E + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfcc6021c89e0> = 'text/html;
